emails.subject: NATURAL GAS NOMINATION FOR 07/00
emails.body: Sitara #139066 has a max of 9500 in the flex nom. Is this correct? Should the additional 1500 be on a swing ticket or included on the index ticket? D Forwarded by Daren J Farmer/HOU/ECT on 06/26/2000 05:45 PM Michael Mitcham@ENRON 06/26/2000 05:28 PM

emails.subject: Re: NATURAL GAS NOMINATION FOR 07/00
emails.body: Re: NATURAL GAS NOMINATION FOR 07/00 I went ahead ahead and accepted the nom, put it in at start of the month pricing on the base ticket and ignored the 9500 limit, because it's a good price!! Daren J Farmer 06/26/2000 05:47 PM
